diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,143 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default router configuration using SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Sets default router to SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallback.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base implementation of Hono framework core functionality including routing, middleware, request handling, and request/response methods.
+- Names noticed: compose, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, METHOD_NAME_ALL_LOWERCASE, Env, ErrorHandler, FetchEventLike, H, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath.
+- Simple note: Handles GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, ALL methods with router matching and middleware composition.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router family entry point that exports PatternRouter class.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Single file index that re-exports the main router implementation.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using regex pattern matching for route registration and matching.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns to regex and matches incoming requests against them.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router family entry point that exports LinearRouter class.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Single file index that re-exports the main router implementation.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter as linear list-based route matching with string comparison and parameter extraction.
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Iterates through routes in registration order and matches exact paths or uses string-based logic with parameter extraction.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router family entry point that exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Router family with two classes - one for runtime usage and one for serialization/deserialization.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter using trie-based structure that builds regular expressions for route matching.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, PATH_ERROR, RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, match, emptyParam, Trie.
+- Simple note: Builds trie from routes, constructs regex from trie, caches matchers and rebuilds on first match.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher interface and match function for regex-based route matching.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, Match, emptyParam, emptyParam, MatcherMap.
+- Simple note: Matches incoming request against cached regex and extracts parameters or looks up static routes.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PreparedRegExpRouter class that accepts pre-built matchers and relocate map for zero-registration runtime.
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, HandlerData, match, emptyParam, PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Uses pre-built regex matchers and relocates handlers at runtime instead of rebuilding the trie.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Node class for trie structure used in RegExpRouter for building route tree.
+- Names noticed: ParamAssocArray, Node, PATH_ERROR, Label_RegExp_Str, Only_Wildcard_Reg_Exp_Str, Tail_Wildcard_Reg_Exp_Str, Context.
+- Simple note: Recursive node structure for trie with children and inserted paths, builds regex strings from the trie.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Trie class that builds regex from path tokens and returns matchable regular expression.
+- Names noticed: Context, ParamAssocArray, Node, ReplacementMap, Trie, groups, tokens.
+- Simple note: Processes path tokens, replaces grouped patterns, inserts into node tree, builds final regex with replacement maps.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router family entry point that exports SmartRouter class.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Single file index that re-exports the main router implementation.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter as router orchestrator that tries routers in order until one succeeds.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Tries each registered router in sequence, registers routes on first successful router, caches active router.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router family entry point that exports TrieRouter class.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Single file index that re-exports the main router implementation.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using tree structure for efficient O(1) exact path lookup with fallback to prefix matches.
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, Node, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Builds prefix tree from routes, searches by traversing tree from root, falls back to parent nodes on partial matches.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Node class for prefix tree used in TrieRouter with pattern matching support.
+- Names noticed: Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, Node.
+- Simple note: Tree node with method handlers and patterns, traverses tree during search, stores and merges parameters from parent nodes.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Provides shared test runner and common test cases for router testing using Vitest.
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, runTest, getSuiteHierarchy, match.
+- Simple note: Runs common router test cases with router creation and match function.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter including all common cases plus router-specific unsupported paths and trailing slash behavior.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests pattern-based matching with regex compilation, allows paths that may be ambiguous in other routers.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter including all common cases plus router-specific limitations.
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests linear string-based matching with parameter extraction, rejects complex regex patterns and trailing slash in some cases.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter including all common cases and router-specific unsupported path constraints.
+- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, RegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests trie-based regex building and matching, enforces stricter path registration rules than other routers.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter as a composed router that wraps other router implementations.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Very minimal tests that verify SmartRouter delegates to its first active router and matches behavior of its wrapped routers.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter including all common cases and full behavior including node-level tests.
+- Names noticed: runTest, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Comprehensive tests of tree-based routing including all common cases without router-specific skips.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests Node class at the trie tree level for pattern matching and search behavior.
+- Names noticed: Node.
+- Simple note: Lower-level unit tests for trie node operations independent of router integration.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+- Pattern Router: Pattern-based approach with regex compilation
+  - src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Linear Router: String-based linear iteration approach
+  - src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- RegExp Router: Trie-based regex building approach
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+  - src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Smart Router: Router wrapper/composer approach
+  - src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Trie Router: Pure prefix tree without regex compilation
+  - src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+  - src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+  - src/router/trie-router/node.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark task document for a routing-read-write-ledger. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the listed files from the repository
3. Create a markdown document with specific sections for each file
4. Include a cross-file checklist for router families

Let me start by creating the directory and then reading all the files. I'll use multiple read commands in parallel since I have many files to read.

The files I need to read are:
1. src/hono.ts
2. src/hono-base.ts
3. src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
4. src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
5. src/router/linear-router/index.ts
6. src/router/linear-router/router.ts
7. src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
8. src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
9. src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
10. src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
11. src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
12. src/router/re
